system.flavor: A shard of Divine Death, summoned with a snap of the finger.
system.effect:
Area effect the effect die. If your target is at the exact range of the effect die, this ability deals 3d3 damage on hit instead.
Attack: 2 damage, Hit: +1d3
Finishing Blow 1(target) area effect explosion, 2 damage and push 1. If your target is in crisis, increase damage and burst by +1.
